feedbackIssueTitleTemplate.description: Default GitHub issue title for feedback

feedbackIssueBodyTemplate.message:
## Privacy Notice
- Please do NOT paste any copied content or personal data.

## Environment
- Extension Version: $EXT_VERSION$
- Extension ID: $EXT_ID$
- User Agent: $USER_AGENT$
- navigator.language: $NAV_LANG$
- UI Language: $UI_LANG$

## Settings Snapshot (copilot_settings)
```json
$SETTINGS_JSON$
```

## Growth Stats (copilot_growth_stats)
```json
$GROWTH_STATS_JSON$
```

## Local Funnel Summary (copilot_growth_funnel_summary)
```json
$GROWTH_FUNNEL_JSON$
```

## Telemetry Events (copilot_telemetry_events, last up to $TELEMETRY_LAST_N$)
```json
$TELEMETRY_EVENTS_JSON$
```

## Steps to Reproduce
1. 

## Expected Result
-

## Actual Result

proWaitlistIssueTitleTemplate.message: Pro Waitlist: <Your use case in one sentence>
proWaitlistIssueTitleTemplate.description: Default GitHub issue title for Pro waitlist

proWaitlistIssueBodyTemplate.message:
## Privacy Notice
- Please do NOT paste any webpage content or copied content.
- Please do NOT paste any personal data.

## Pro scope (Free vs Planned)
- Existing free core features will remain free (no paywall).
- Pro is optional, planned enhancements (not shipped yet).
- Doc: https://github.com/ayqy/copy/blob/main/docs/monetization/pro-scope.md

## Environment
- Extension Version: $EXT_VERSION$
- Extension ID: $EXT_ID$
- navigator.language: $NAV_LANG$
- UI Language: $UI_LANG$

## Use case
-

## Desired Pro capabilities
-

## Contact (optional)
-
proWaitlistIssueBodyTemplate.description: GitHub issue body template for Pro waitlist

upgradePro.description: Popup entry for upgrading to Pro

popupProWaitlistCopy.description: Popup entry: copy Pro waitlist template

proSubtitle.message: No popups, no pressure. Validate intent first, then decide what to build.

proIntro.message: Pro focuses on stronger workflows and saving time, as an optional enhancement without breaking the free core experience.

proFreeScopeTitle.description: Options Pro tab: free scope section title

proFreeScopeHint.message: These are shipped core capabilities, and we commit to keep them free (no paywall).
proFreeScopeHint.description: Options Pro tab: free scope section hint

proFreeFeature1.message: Smart block copy: click/double-click to extract the main content and copy as Markdown / plain text
proFreeFeature1.description: Options Pro tab: free capability bullet 1

proFreeFeature2.message: Hover-to-copy for code blocks + conservative cleanup (indent/blank lines, bounded line number handling, drop leading/trailing Copy-label lines)
proFreeFeature2.description: Options Pro tab: free capability bullet 2

proFreeFeature3.message: Append Mode (hold Shift to merge multiple clips with separators)
proFreeFeature3.description: Options Pro tab: free capability bullet 3

proFreeFeature4.description: Options Pro tab: free capability bullet 4

proFreeFeature5.description: Options Pro tab: free capability bullet 5

proFreeFeature6.message: Configurable default chat service and auto-open-after-copy (based on local settings)
proFreeFeature6.description: Options Pro tab: free capability bullet 6

proPlannedScopeTitle.description: Options Pro tab: planned scope section title

proPlannedScopeHint.message: The following are waitlist/planned ideas (not shipped yet).
proPlannedScopeHint.description: Options Pro tab: planned scope section hint

proFeature1.message: Advanced page cleaning (reader mode + rules to remove ads/comments/recommendations)

proFeature2.message: Batch collection & organization (collect across pages, naming, export, history search)

proFeature3.message: Advanced Prompt Pack / team sharing (backend features postponed)

proFeature4.message: Exports for note tools (structured templates for Obsidian/Notion)

proPrivacyHint.message: The waitlist issue is prefilled with extension version/ID and language only. No webpage or copied content is included.

proScopeLearnMore.description: Options Pro tab: learn more link text

womActionsHint.message: Share, rate, or send feedback to help Copylot keep improving.

popupOnboardingStep1Desc1.message: Choose your trigger: single-click / double-click / hover.

popupOnboardingStep1Desc2.message: You can also apply our recommended settings (no intrusive features).

privacyDescription.message: Off by default; only records anonymous events locally. No network, no disruptions.
